data.name: Capture it. Keep it in sight.
A local-first screenshot and floating-reference tool for Windows.
data.value: 本機優先的 Windows 擷取與浮動參考工具。

data.name: Drag any region across one or more displays. Copy, save, or pin the result.
data.value: 在一個或多個顯示器上拖動選擇區域，然后復制、保存或貼出結果。

data.name: Keep images, image files, text, or hex colors in borderless topmost windows.
data.value: 將圖片、圖片文件、文字或十六進制顏色保留在無邊框置頂窗口中。

data.name: Drag to move, scroll to resize, Ctrl+scroll for opacity, and right-click for tools.
data.value: 拖動可移動，滾輪可縮放，Ctrl+滾輪調整透明度，右鍵打開工具。

data.name: Choose the key that starts region capture.
data.value: 選擇啟動區域截圖的按鍵。

data.name: Alt+Shift+P restores click-through pins
data.value: Alt+Shift+P 可恢復鼠標穿透的貼圖

data.name: Always launch SnapPin as administrator
data.value: 始終以管理員身份啟動 SnapPin

data.name: Applies the next time SnapPin starts. Windows will show a UAC confirmation prompt.
data.value: 下次啟動 SnapPin 時生效。Windows 將顯示用戶賬戶控制確認提示。

data.name: Back up open pins and settings automatically
data.value: 自動備份打開的貼圖和設置

data.name: Keep SnapPin running in the notification area when the dashboard closes
data.value: 關閉主界面后仍在通知區域運行 SnapPin

data.name: Settings are stored locally under your Windows user profile. No account or cloud connection is used.
data.value: 設置保存在本機 Windows 用戶配置中，不需要賬戶或云端連接。

data.name: Show full-screen cross lines at the cursor
data.value: 在光標處顯示全屏十字線

data.name: Show coordinate and size badge above the selection
data.value: 在選擇區域上方顯示坐標和尺寸

data.name: Show automatic window and UI-element detection outline
data.value: 顯示自動窗口和界面元素檢測輪廓

data.name: Exclude SnapPin pins and controls from screenshots and recordings
data.value: 在截圖和錄屏中排除 SnapPin 貼圖及控件

data.name: W / A / S / D Move cursor precisely
data.value: W / A / S / D 精確移動光標

data.name: Mouse wheel Parent / child UI element
data.value: 鼠標滾輪 父級 / 子級界面元素

data.name: Shift + C Recognize and copy text
data.value: Shift + C 識別并復制文字

data.name: Tab Window / element mode
data.value: Tab 窗口 / 元素模式

data.name: Automatically follows Windows display scaling.
data.value: 自動適配 Windows 顯示縮放。

data.name: Drawing tools shown directly in the first capture row.
data.value: 繪圖工具直接顯示在截圖工具欄第一行。

data.name: Output actions shown after the drawing tools.
data.value: 輸出操作顯示在繪圖工具之后。

data.name: MP4 uses Windows Media Foundation and stays entirely on this computer.
data.value: MP4 使用 Windows Media Foundation，所有處理均在本機完成。

data.name: Show a shadow around pinned windows
data.value: 在貼圖窗口周圍顯示陰影

data.name: Make new pinned images text-selectable by default (local OCR)
data.value: 新貼圖默認可選擇文字（本地 OCR）

data.name: Manage named groups from the Pins tab on the SnapPin dashboard
data.value: 在 SnapPin 主界面的“貼圖”選項卡中管理命名分組

data.name: Switch bound pin groups automatically with Windows virtual desktops
data.value: 隨 Windows 虛擬桌面自動切換已關聯的貼圖分組

data.name: Organize floating references into groups. A group can follow a Windows virtual desktop automatically.
data.value: 將浮動參考內容整理到分組中，分組可自動跟隨 Windows 虛擬桌面。

data.name: Completed captures are stored locally. When the limit is reached, the oldest captures are removed automatically.
data.value: 已完成的截圖保存在本機。達到上限時會自動移除最舊的截圖。

data.name: Include a shadow when saving or copying as files
data.value: 保存或復制為文件時包含陰影

data.name: Show a notification after quick save
Automatically save every completed capture
data.value: 自動保存每次完成的截圖

data.name: The emergency Alt+Shift+P shortcut always remains available so click-through pins can be recovered.
data.value: 緊急快捷鍵 Alt+Shift+P 始終可用，以便恢復鼠標穿透的貼圖。

data.name: English + Chinese + Japanese
data.value: 英語 + 中文 + 日語

data.name: English + 简体 + 繁體
data.value: 英語 + 簡體中文 + 繁體中文

data.name: Text and QR/barcode recognition runs on this computer. Images are not uploaded to a cloud service.
data.value: 文字與二維碼/條碼識別均在本機運行，圖片不會上傳到云端。

data.name: Automatically recognizes positioned text when a new pin opens. Each pin can still override this from its right-click menu.
data.value: 打開新貼圖時自動識別文字。每個貼圖仍可在右鍵菜單中單獨切換。

data.name: Local-first capture and floating visual references
data.value: 本地優先的截圖與浮動視覺參考工具

data.name: This is an independent implementation built with documented Windows APIs. It contains no Snipaste code, branding, or assets.
data.value: 這是使用公開 Windows API 構建的獨立實現，不包含 Snipaste 的代碼、品牌或資源。

data.name: Unexpected errors are logged locally. Logs are retained for 14 days and open pins use verified generation backups.
data.value: 意外錯誤會記錄在本機，日志保留 14 天；打開的貼圖使用經過驗證的多版本備份。

data.name: Check for updates when SnapPin starts
Windows lets SnapPin hide its own windows from video capture. Other applications are securely covered in still screenshots; video exclusion also requires privacy support from that application.
data.value: Windows 可讓 SnapPin 在錄屏中隱藏自己的窗口。其他應用會在靜態截圖中被安全覆蓋；若要在錄屏中排除，還需要該應用支持隱私保護。

data.name: Windows will display a User Account Control prompt when SnapPin starts
data.value: SnapPin 啟動時 Windows 將顯示用戶賬戶控制提示

data.name: Recognize text and QR/barcodes
data.value: 識別文字和二維碼/條碼

data.name: Set optional dimensions, ratio, delay, and cursor capture.
data.value: 可設置尺寸、比例、延遲和是否包含光標。

data.name: Use 0 for a freely drawn width
data.value: 設為 0 可自由繪制寬度

data.name: Use 0 for a freely drawn height
data.value: 設為 0 可自由繪制高度

data.name: Tip: leave width and height at 0 to constrain only the aspect ratio.
data.value: 提示：寬度和高度都設為 0 時僅限制寬高比。

data.name: Drag to choose the crop area
Recognize text and scan QR/barcodes
data.value: 識別文字并掃描二維碼/條碼

data.name: Drag the smaller area to recognize
data.value: 拖動選擇較小的識別區域

data.name: Open recognized web link
data.value: 打開識別到的網頁鏈接

data.name: Stop and review recording (R or Esc)
data.value: 停止并檢查錄制（R 或 Esc）

data.name: Search title, tag, text, or barcode
data.value: 搜索標題、標簽、文字或條碼

data.name: Search OCR text, barcode content, source, dimensions, or date
data.value: 搜索識別文字、條碼內容、來源、尺寸或日期

data.name: One or more selected shortcuts are already used by Windows or another app
data.value: 一個或多個所選快捷鍵已被 Windows 或其他應用占用

data.name:
The interface language has changed. Restart SnapPin now to apply it throughout the app?
Choose No to apply it the next time SnapPin starts.
data.value:
界面語言已更改。是否立即重新啟動 SnapPin，以在整個應用中應用新語言？
選擇“否”將在下次啟動 SnapPin 時應用。

data.name: SnapPin could not restart automatically. Please close and open it again.
data.value: SnapPin 無法自動重新啟動，請關閉后再次打開。

data.name: {0} of {1} saved items
data.value: 顯示 {1} 項中的 {0} 項

data.name: Move this item to the recycle bin?
Permanently delete this item and its files?
data.value: 永久刪除此項目及其文件？

data.name: Permanently delete every item in the recycle bin?
data.value: 永久刪除回收站中的所有項目？

data.name: Move every active item to the recycle bin?
data.value: 將所有有效項目移到回收站？

data.name: No text or code was found.
saved with capture history
data.value: 已隨截圖歷史記錄保存

data.name: The recognition area was too small. Select an area and try again.
data.value: 識別區域太小，請選擇一個區域后重試。

data.name: SnapPin {0} is installed. The official GitHub update source is unavailable.
data.value: 已安裝 SnapPin {0}，但官方 GitHub 更新源當前不可用。

data.name: The official update source is not a valid HTTPS address.
data.value: 官方更新源不是有效的 HTTPS 地址。

data.name: The GitHub release did not contain a valid version.
data.value: GitHub 版本中沒有有效的版本號。

data.name: See the GitHub release page for full release notes.
data.value: 完整更新說明請查看 GitHub 發布頁面。

data.name: The required update package is not attached to this GitHub release.
data.value: 此 GitHub 版本未附加所需的更新包。

data.name: Choose a SnapPin output folder
data.value: 選擇 SnapPin 輸出文件夾

data.name: Click an annotation to select it, then drag to move it.
data.value: 單擊標注以選擇，然后拖動進行移動。

data.name: Click to place text. Enter adds a line; Ctrl+Enter finishes.
data.value: 單擊放置文字。Enter 換行；Ctrl+Enter 完成。

data.name: Click the image, type the callout, then press Ctrl+Enter.
data.value: 單擊圖片并輸入標注內容，然后按 Ctrl+Enter 完成。

data.name: Click the image to add the next numbered marker.
data.value: 單擊圖片以添加下一個編號標記。

data.name: Drag the eraser over only the pixels you want to remove.
data.value: 用橡皮擦拖過需要移除的像素。

data.name: Drag to paint blur directly where the brush passes.
data.value: 拖動畫筆，直接模糊經過的位置。

data.name: Drag on the image to add {0}.
Unmatched frame ignored; retrying
data.value: 已忽略無法匹配的幀，正在重試

data.name:
The interface language has changed. Restart SnapPin now to apply it throughout the app?
Choose Later to apply it the next time SnapPin starts.
data.value:
界面語言已更改。是否立即重新啟動 SnapPin，以在整個應用中應用新語言？
選擇“稍后”將在下次啟動 SnapPin 時應用。

data.name: SnapPin could not determine its executable path.
data.value: SnapPin 無法判斷其執行檔路徑。

data.name: Administrator launch was cancelled. SnapPin will continue with normal permissions for this session.
data.value: 已取消以系統管理員身分啟動。SnapPin 將在本次工作階段中以一般權限繼續執行。

data.name: SnapPin could not restart as administrator: {0}
data.value: SnapPin 無法以系統管理員身分重新啟動：{0}

data.name:
SnapPin recovered after the previous unexpected close. Open pins were restored from the last verified backup.
You can review the local diagnostic log in Preferences > About.
data.value:
SnapPin 已從上次意外關閉中復原。開啟的釘選已從最近驗證的備份中還原。
您可以在「偏好設定 > 關於」中檢視本機診斷記錄。

data.name:
The recording was not added to history, but Windows kept the temporary file open:
{0}
data.value:
錄製未加入歷史記錄，但 Windows 仍占用該暫存檔：
{0}

data.name: The GitHub update package must use HTTPS.
data.value: GitHub 更新套件必須使用 HTTPS。

data.name: The downloaded GitHub package failed its SHA-256 integrity check.
data.value: 下載的 GitHub 更新套件未通過 SHA-256 完整性檢查。

data.name: A portable update cannot replace files in a drive root.
data.value: 可攜版更新不能取代磁碟根目錄中的檔案。

data.name: The portable GitHub package did not contain SnapPin.exe.
data.value: GitHub 可攜版更新套件中不包含 SnapPin.exe。

data.name: Windows could not start the portable update helper.
data.value: Windows 無法啟動可攜版更新助手。

data.name: The portable update contained an unsafe path.
data.value: 可攜版更新包含不安全的路徑。

data.name: The image could not be prepared for WebP export.
data.value: 無法準備影像以匯出為 WebP。

data.name: Windows could not trim this recording ({0}).
OCR language files are missing.
data.value: 缺少 OCR 語言檔案。

data.name: Downloading SnapPin update…
data.value: 正在下載 SnapPin 更新…

data.name: Checking the package integrity before any files are changed.
data.value: 正在檢查套件完整性，尚未變更任何檔案。

data.name: Do not close this window while the portable files are being replaced.
data.value: 取代可攜版檔案時請勿關閉此視窗。

data.name: Extracting and validating the update in a temporary folder.
data.value: 正在暫存資料夾中解壓縮並驗證更新。

data.name: Restart and update to SnapPin {0}...
data.value: 重新啟動並更新至 SnapPin {0}...

data.name: SnapPin {0} is available. Click to review and download it.
data.value: SnapPin {0} 已發布。按一下以檢視並下載。

data.name: SnapPin {0} is downloaded and ready. Click to choose when to restart.
data.value: SnapPin {0} 已下載並準備就緒。按一下以選擇重新啟動時間。

data.name:
SnapPin could not apply update {0}. The previous version was restored.
{1}
data.value:
SnapPin 無法套用更新 {0}。已還原先前版本。
{1}

data.name: The downloaded SnapPin version ({0}) did not match the expected version ({1}).
data.value: 下載的 SnapPin 版本（{0}）與預期版本（{1}）不相符。

data.name: The installer is downloaded and verified. Install it now, or choose Later to keep using this version.
data.value: 安裝程式已下載並通過驗證。立即安裝，或選擇「稍後」繼續使用此版本。

data.name: The portable SnapPin folder is not writable.
data.value: 可攜版 SnapPin 資料夾無法寫入。

data.name: The portable update needs at least {0} of free space.
data.value: 可攜版更新至少需要 {0} 可用空間。

data.name: The portable update request is incomplete.
data.value: 可攜版更新要求不完整。

data.name: The portable update request is invalid: {0}
The portable update request is not safe to apply.
data.value: 此可攜版更新要求無法安全套用。

data.name: The prepared portable update is no longer available. Download it again.
data.value: 已準備的可攜版更新已無法使用。請重新下載。

data.name: The previous version was restored. Reopening SnapPin...
data.value: 已還原先前版本。正在重新開啟 SnapPin...

data.name: The staged SnapPin executable is missing.
data.value: 暫存的 SnapPin 執行檔遺失。

data.name: The update helper is not running from the verified staging folder.
data.value: 更新助手未從已驗證的暫存資料夾執行。

data.name: The update is downloaded, verified, and prepared. Restart SnapPin now to replace the portable files, or choose Later to keep using this version.
data.value: 更新已下載、驗證並準備完成。立即重新啟動 SnapPin 以取代可攜版檔案，或選擇「稍後」繼續使用此版本。

data.name: Update completed. Restarting SnapPin...
data.value: 更新完成。正在重新啟動 SnapPin...

data.name: Update failed. Restoring the previous version...
data.value: 更新失敗。正在還原先前版本...

data.name: Verifying the updated version...
data.value: 正在驗證更新後的版本...

data.name: Waiting for SnapPin to close...
data.value: 正在等待 SnapPin 關閉...
